/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/home/benno111/Android/Sdk/ndk/29.0.14206865/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -shared -Wl,-soname,libdav1d.so -o libdav1d.so CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/cdf.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/cpu.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/data.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/decode.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/dequant_tables.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/getbits.c.o CMakeFiles/dav1d.dir/src/intra_edge.c.o
